steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which season hazelnuts reached their highest price, according to the graph. The student needs to identify the hazelnut bars across all four seasons (2016/17, 2017/18, 2018/19, 2019/20) and find the tallest one.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 2017/18 season.: The hazelnut bar for 2017/18 is lower than the 2016/17 bar. ✗
  • Choice B — 2016/17 season.: The hazelnut bar for 2016/17 is the tallest across all four seasons, showing the highest price. ✓
  • Choice C — 2018/19 season.: The hazelnut bar for 2018/19 is lower than the 2016/17 bar. ✗
  • Choice D — 2019/20 season.: The hazelnut bar for 2019/20 is lower than the 2016/17 bar. ✗
That matches Choice B — 2016/17 season..
